subcodes.first_line: The missive which that honored one sent unto Samandar - upon him be My loving-kindness and mercy - hath reached the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آنجناب که بسمندر علیه عنایتی و رحمتی ارسال داشتند بساحت اقدس ارسال نمود
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @outward and inward meanings, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
